name: @quantumwake/react-assistant
description: A reusable React assistant component with tool-calling agentic loop. Supports OpenAI and Anthropic LLM backends.
author: QuantumWake

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:dry: npm run lint && npm run build && npm publish --access public --dry-run
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch && npm run release
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor && npm run release
scripts.version:major: npm version major && npm run release
